testCases.title: Verify that authenticated user can place an order after login

steps.action: Navigate to url "https://www.demoblaze.com/" and log in with username "testqentrix" and password "testqentrix@12345"
Add a product to cart and navigate to Cart page
steps.expected: Cart should display the selected product

steps.action: Fill in required order details including name, country, city, credit card, month, and year
steps.expected: All order fields should be populated with valid data

steps.action: Verify order confirmation message is displayed with purchase details
steps.expected: Confirmation modal should show order ID and amount
